case_title: JUNYU CHEN VS. A&M PROPERTIES, LP

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) MADELEINE ALVAREZ, PROPERTY MANAGER. FILED BY DEFENDANT A&M PROPERTIES, LP
DECLARATION OF NON-SERVICE & REQUEST FOR RESET OF COURT DATE.PL [DECLARATION SUBMITTED ON SC-150 FORM] FILED BY PLAINTIFF CHEN, JUNYU

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-25-2022 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO DEC-14-2022 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF JUNYU CHEN IS PRESENT WITH WITNESS MARK BERGHAUSEN. DEFENDANT A&M PROPERTIES, LP IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY MADELEINE ALVAREZ, PROPERTY MANAGER. PARTIES WENT OUTSIDE THE COURT HALLWAY AT 11:00AM ATTEMPT TO WORK ON SETTLEMENT. PARTIES CAME BACK IN COURT AT 11:03AM, PARTIES CAME TO A SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT FOR A PAYMENT OF $142.66 TO THE PLAINTIFF. PAYMENT TO BE MADE BY CHECK AND MAILED OUT. APPEARANCE IS REQUIRED AT THE DECEMBER 14, 2022 HEARING IF NO PAYMENT IS MADE. IF NO APPEARANCES THE CASE WILL BE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE PER SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID LAVINE; CLERK: D. AU. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$-NONE-) SERVED AUG-10-2022, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT A&M PROPERTIES, LP
STIPULATION TO USE JUDGE PRO TEM OR HEARING OFFICER. FILED BY CHEN, JUNYU A&M PROPERTIES, LP
ORDER CASE CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT: PENDING SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)
ORDER TO DISMISS CASE WITH PREJUDICE PURSUANT TO SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT.
TRIAL RESET TO OCT-25-2022 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF AUG-12-2022 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE PURSUANT TO SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. PLAINTIFF JUNYU CHEN IS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT A & M PROPERTIES IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: WILLIAM ; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $255.00 FILED BY CHEN, JUNYU AS TO DEFENDANT A&M PROPERTIES, LP ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-12-2022 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
